## Summary
Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Scope
- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Database schema or query behavior
- [ ] Jobs or scheduling behavior
- [ ] Configuration or environment variables

## Knowledge Pack Updates
- [ ] If commands or task labels changed, I updated docs/DEVELOPMENT.md and docs/TESTING.md.
- [ ] If architecture or boundaries changed, I updated docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and related guides.
- [ ] If DB or queue behavior changed, I updated docs/DATABASE_GUIDE.md or docs/JOB_QUEUE_GUIDE.md.
- [ ] If service/cog responsibilities changed, I updated docs/SERVICE_LAYER_GUIDE.md or docs/BOT_COGS_GUIDE.md.

See docs/README.md for the knowledge pack maintenance checklist.

## Testing
- [ ] Relevant pytest tests pass locally or via remote task.
- [ ] Documentation snippets and command names still match repository behavior.
